title: Prompt Mint: Unlock Services Dashboard
description: Visualizes API health, unlock outcomes, and latency. Separates service failures from user errors.

panels.title: Service Failures (5xx Errors)
panels.description: Unexpected API failures indicating a service degradation.

panels.title: API Request Duration (P99)
panels.description: API latency monitoring RPC delays or indexer lag.

panels.title: User Errors (Unlock Failures by Reason)
panels.description: User-facing errors such as invalid_signature or no_access (purchase failures/delays).

panels.title: Unlock Success vs Challenge Issued
panels.description: Conversion rate from challenge to successful unlock.

panels.title: Rate Limits Hit
panels.description: Volume of requests blocked by rate limiting.
